name: New skill
about: Propose a new skill for the mifunedev/skills library
title: "skill: <name>"
labels: new-skill

## Skill name

<!-- Lowercase + hyphens, ≤ 64 chars. Must match the folder name under skills/. -->

## Description

<!-- What does this skill do? When should an agent invoke it? (≤ 1024 chars) -->

## Category

<!-- One of: open-harness, dev-workflow, code-review, cloud-ops, docs, experimental -->

## Required tools

<!-- Binaries the skill assumes are on PATH (e.g., gh, git, docker) -->

## Draft SKILL.md (optional)

<!-- Paste a rough draft of the frontmatter + body if you have one -->
